ModMetaData.name: DefLoadCache
ModMetaData.author: FluxxField
ModMetaData.description:
Dramatically reduces RimWorld launch time on repeat loads by caching the results of mod XML loading and patch application.
On the first launch with a given mod list, DefLoadCache builds a cache of the fully-patched def tree. On subsequent launches with the same mod list, it skips reading thousands of XML files from disk and re-running thousands of XML patches — loading the cached result instead.
Tested on a 576-mod load order: launch time reduced from ~14 minutes to ~8 minutes (45% faster). The mod XML loading and patch application pipeline specifically goes from ~6 minutes to ~23 seconds.
Features: - Automatic cache invalidation when mods, RimWorld version, or DLLs change - Support for multiple mod list profiles (switch between RimPy profiles without losing caches) - Configurable settings with per-feature toggles - Safe fallback: if anything goes wrong, the game loads normally - Zero gameplay impact: only affects load time
Requires Prepatcher.
